ideogram.prompt: Technical system architecture diagram, dark navy background (#0A1628), clean modern infographic style, professional SaaS documentation
ideogram.negative_prompt: photographs, people, realistic, blurry text, handwritten, 3D render

composition.layout: horizontal pipeline, left to right, 6 connected stages
composition.background: dark navy (#0A1628) with subtle dot grid pattern
composition.typography: white sans-serif (Inter or SF Pro style), clean readable labels
composition.connectors: thin glowing lines between stages, subtle arrow heads, data flow direction left to right

stages.label: TRIGGERS
stages.shape: rounded rectangle with 5 small entry point boxes above it

stages.label: PRE-FLIGHT
stages.shape: rounded rectangle with 5 small probe boxes inside in a row

stages.label: ENRICHMENT
stages.shape: largest box, contains a mini flowchart inside showing the waterfall
stages.annotation: 4 companies processed in parallel, waterfall is sequential per company

stages.label: DELIVERY
stages.shape: rounded rectangle with routing table inside

stages.label: SYNC
details: Airtable: upsert contact, set status = in_sequence, link to project
Slack: post summary to #ecas-signals with counts + campaign breakdown

stages.label: SELF-HEAL
stages.icon: wrench with circular arrow / brain icon
stages.shape: rounded rectangle with retry loop diagram below it
details: Retry Engine: classify error by HTTP status code
429 → wait + retry | 401 → alert + stop | 500 → backoff + retry
Circuit Breaker: 5 failures → block 5 min → half-open test
Claude Haiku: reads error + context → root cause + suggested fix
Slack Escalation: full diagnosis with manual retry command
stages.annotation: Dotted lines connect back to stages 3, 4, 5 showing retry coverage

bottom_section.label: RETRY FLOW
bottom_section.description: Below the main pipeline, show a horizontal sequence: API Call Fails → Classify (429/401/500/402/timeout) → Strategy (wait/stop/backoff) → Retry or Escalate → Circuit Breaker (open after 5 fails) → Claude AI Diagnosis → Slack Alert
bottom_section.visual: Red-orange gradient bar with icons at each step, circular arrows showing the loop

adobe_firefly.prompt: Technical system architecture diagram on dark navy background. Professional SaaS infographic with 6 color-coded stages flowing horizontally left to right connected by glowing lines. Stage 1 TRIGGERS in blue (#4A90D9) with clock icon showing 5 entry points. Stage 2 PRE-FLIGHT in green (#27AE60) with shield icon showing 5 parallel health probes with checkmarks. Stage 3 ENRICHMENT in purple (#8E44AD) with magnifying glass showing a 5-step API waterfall flow with branching paths for fallback. Stage 4 DELIVERY in violet (#9B59B6) with rocket icon showing a sector to campaign routing table with 6 mappings. Stage 5 SYNC in teal (#1ABC9C) with database icon showing Airtable and Slack sync. Stage 6 SELF-HEAL in red (#E74C3C) with wrench and brain icon showing retry loop with exponential backoff visualization 2s 4s 8s 16s and circuit breaker open-closed states. Below the main pipeline a horizontal retry flow bar in red-orange showing error classification and Claude AI diagnosis. Clean flat design rounded corners subtle gradients white sans-serif text labels. No photographs no people.

midjourney_v6.prompt: Technical system architecture diagram, dark navy background, modern SaaS infographic. Six color-coded stages flow left to right: TRIGGERS (blue #4A90D9, clock icon, 5 entry points) → PRE-FLIGHT (green #27AE60, shield icon, 5 parallel health checks) → ENRICHMENT (purple #8E44AD, magnifying glass, 5-step API waterfall with fallback branches) → DELIVERY (violet #9B59B6, rocket icon, sector routing table) → SYNC (teal #1ABC9C, database icon, Airtable + Slack) → SELF-HEAL (red #E74C3C, wrench + brain, retry loop with circuit breaker). Below: retry flow bar showing exponential backoff 2s→4s→8s→16s and Claude AI diagnosis. Connected by thin glowing lines. Clean flat design, rounded corners, white sans-serif text, professional documentation style --ar 16:9 --style raw --no photo realistic people 3d

diagram_description_for_any_tool.title: ECAS Self-Healing Enrichment Pipeline
diagram_description_for_any_tool.subtitle: Apollo → Findymail → Smartlead → Airtable with retry, circuit breaker, and AI diagnosis

stages_summary.1_TRIGGERS: 5 ways to start: cron, hot signal, budget window, API, CLI
stages_summary.2_PREFLIGHT: 5 parallel health probes: Apollo, Findymail, Smartlead, Airtable, env vars → healthy/degraded/blocked
stages_summary.3_ENRICHMENT: Apollo 3-step waterfall (org→people→reveal) + Findymail fallback + verify gate. 4 companies in parallel.
stages_summary.4_DELIVERY: Sector→campaign routing (6 sectors, 6 campaigns). Sequential enrollment with cached dedup.
stages_summary.6_SELFHEAL: Retry engine (error classification by HTTP status) + circuit breaker (5 fails→block 5min) + Claude Haiku diagnosis → Slack escalation
